name: smartrecruiters-cli
description: CLI for searching jobs on SmartRecruiters-hosted company career boards (api.smartrecruiters.com) — no authentication, zero runtime dependencies. Company-scoped: SmartRecruiters has no global keyword search across all employers it hosts, so you must supply one or more SmartRecruiters company identifiers (e.g. "Equinox", "Visa").
